TABLE OF CONTENTS

Item 1. Business ................................................ 3

Item 1A. Risk Factors ........................................... 9

Item 3. Legal Proceedings ...................................... 21

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis ................... 33

PART I

Item 1. Business

Apple designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories. The company sells services and operates globally across consumer and enterprise markets.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

The company's business, results of operations, and financial condition may be affected by macroeconomic uncertainty, supply constraints, regulatory changes, litigation, and competitive pressure.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 2. Properties

The company owns and leases facilities.

Item 3. Legal Proceedings

The company is subject to legal proceedings and claims that arise in the ordinary course of business. Management believes these matters are not expected to have a material adverse effect.

Item 4. Mine Safety Disclosures

Not applicable.

PART II

Item 5. Market for Registrant's Common Equity

Common equity is traded on Nasdaq.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Net sales increased due to services growth and product demand. Management monitors liquidity, capital allocation, foreign exchange exposure, and operating expenses when evaluating future performance.

Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

The company is exposed to interest rate and currency risk.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Financial statements follow.
